## Problem

What concrete workflow problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful improvement.

## Why Existing Tools Are Not Enough

Explain why current tools or docs do not already cover this well.

## Notes

Add tradeoffs, constraints, or examples if relevant.
